# clawvisor_task_policy (Resource)

The singleton task-guidance policy. Import with id `task_policy`. Requires the `local_governance` capability (spec 06a) on OSS.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# The singleton task-guidance policy applied instance/org-wide.
# Requires the local_governance capability (spec 06a) on OSS.
resource "clawvisor_task_policy" "default" {
  guidance = "Prefer read-only tools; ask before mutating production."
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `guidance` (String) Free-text task guidance applied instance/org-wide.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Always `task_policy` (singleton).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Singleton: the import id is always "task_policy".
terraform import clawvisor_task_policy.default task_policy
```
